creator: gt@freebsd.first.gmd.de
text:
There are 3 errors in the lynx-2.4.2 patch:

first the fix, then follows the errorline from 'make'

1) the include command is '.include "fn"' and not 'include fn':
cd WWW/Library/freebsd; make LYFLAGS="-DDIRED_SUPPORT"
"Makefile", line 27: Need an operator 

2) The same include command error in this file:
"../../Library/Implementation/CommonMakefile", line 67: Need an operator 

3) there is a TAB char in this line which is wrong:
"../../Library/Implementation/CommonMakefile", line 162: Need an operator 

After that it compiles fine.

Fix: 

write the correct include command 2 times, delete the one TAB.
